title: Week 39 '07
content:
This week is pretty much all work week. As a matter of fact, it's a week of single project because I worked on just one project.

I've talked about this time consuming project last week. Yes, it's the **tableful** project. :)

So that's .. weekly recap!

(By the way, this is the last day of the last week of September!!! Time is flying at warp speed these days!!!)

God bless!
